parameters.sqlQuery:
-- ============================================================
-- CAMPAIGN TRACKER — DOUBLE DATES
-- Fechas: 2026-04-20 → 2026-05-05
-- Para nueva campaña: actualizar START_DATE, END_DATE,
-- ms_campaign_filter, landing_names, container_filter
-- ============================================================

WITH

MS_DATA AS (
  SELECT
    m.EVENT_LOCAL_DT   AS fecha,
    m.CAMPAIGN_NAME    AS campaign_name,
    M.LINE_ITEM_NAME   AS line_item,
    CASE
      WHEN (LI.LINE_ITEM_AUDIENCE_DMP IS NOT NULL) OR (JSON_VALUE(LI.LINE_ITEM_SITES_DISPLAYED) IS NOT NULL)
      THEN 'SEGMENTADO' ELSE 'NO SEGMENTADO'
    END AS segmentation,
    SUM(m.CLICKS_QTY)              AS clicks,
    SUM(m.IMPRESSION_VIEWS_QTY)    AS prints
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.BT_ADS_DISP_METRICS_DAILY` m
  INNER JOIN `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.LK_ADS_LINE_ITEMS` LI ON LI.LINE_ITEM_ID = M.LINE_ITEM_ID
  INNER JOIN `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.LK_ADS_ACCOUNTS`   a  ON a.account_id   = m.ACCOUNT_ID
  INNER JOIN `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.LK_ADS_CAMPAIGNS`  C  ON C.CAMPAIGN_ID  = M.CAMPAIGN_ID
  WHERE m.EVENT_LOCAL_DT BETWEEN '2026-04-20' AND '2026-05-05'
    AND M.SIT_SITE_ID       IN ('MLA')
    AND PLACEMENT            LIKE '%MAIN-SLIDER%'
    AND ACCOUNT_TYPE         LIKE '%MARKETING%'
    AND M.CAMPAIGN_NAME      LIKE '%DOUBLEDATES%'
    AND M.LINE_ITEM_NAME NOT LIKE '%SPLINTER%'
    AND M.CAMPAIGN_NAME  NOT LIKE '%FD%'
  GROUP BY ALL
  HAVING SUM(m.PRINTS_QTY) > 0
),

LANDING_DATA AS (
  SELECT
    DATE,
    LANDING_NAME,
    SESSIONS,
    TGMV_168HS          AS nmv,
    ORDERS_168HS        AS orders,
    TRANSACTIONS_168HS  AS transactions,
    SI_168HS            AS nsi,
    NOT_LOG_USERS       AS users_landing,
    LISTADO_TOTAL_USERS AS users_container,
    VPP_TOTAL_USERS     AS users_vip,
    BUYERS_168HS        AS buyers
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_LANDING_ATTRIBUTION_CONTAINER_DEAL`
  WHERE DATE BETWEEN '2026-04-20' AND '2026-05-05'
    AND SITE = 'MLA'
    AND landing_name IN ('ofertas futboleras', '5-5-descuentos-parcial')
),

CONTAINER_DATA AS (
  SELECT
    DATE,
    CONTAINER_NAME,
    C_UNIQUE_SESSION   AS sessions,
    TGMV_168HS         AS nmv,
    SI_168HS           AS nsi,
    ORDERS_168HS       AS orders,
    TRANSACTION_168HS  AS transactions,
    C_UNIQUE_USERS     AS users_container,
    V_UNIQUE_USERS     AS users_vip,
    BUYERS_168HS       AS buyers,
    CASE
      WHEN CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%ACC%')                                           THEN 'ACC'
      WHEN CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%FASHION%')                                       THEN 'FASHION'
      WHEN (CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%BEAUTY%') OR CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%BELLEZA%')) THEN 'BEAUTY'
      WHEN (CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%SALUD%')  OR CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%HEALTH%'))  THEN 'HEALTH'
      WHEN CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%HE%')                                            THEN 'HE'
      WHEN CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%TEC%')                                           THEN 'TEC'
      WHEN CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%CPG%')                                           THEN 'CPG'
      WHEN CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%ENT%')                                           THEN 'ENT'
      WHEN CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%CI%')                                            THEN 'CI'
      WHEN CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%FH%')                                            THEN 'FH'
      WHEN CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%SPORTS%')                                        THEN 'SPORTS'
      WHEN (CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%TB BABY%') OR CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%TB%'))     THEN 'TB'
      WHEN CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%FOOD_DELIVERY%')                                 THEN 'FOOD_DELIVERY'
      WHEN CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%CROSS%')                                         THEN 'CROSS'
      WHEN CONTAINER_NAME LIKE ('%CBT%')                                           THEN 'CBT'
      ELSE 'OTHER'
    END AS vertical
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_CONTAINERS_DEALS_ATTRIBUTION`
  WHERE DATE BETWEEN '2026-04-20' AND '2026-05-05'
    AND SITE = 'MLA'
    AND CONTAINER_NAME LIKE 'MKP DEMAND 5 5 ABRIL 2026%'
),

TOTAL_CONTAINERS_DATA AS (
  SELECT
    DATE,
    SUM(C_UNIQUE_SESSION) AS total_sessions,
    SUM(TGMV_168HS)       AS total_nmv,
    SUM(ORDERS_168HS)     AS total_orders,
    SUM(BUYERS_168HS)     AS total_buyers
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_CONTAINERS_DEALS_ATTRIBUTION`
  WHERE DATE BETWEEN '2026-04-20' AND '2026-05-05'
    AND SITE = 'MLA'
    AND DEAL_CONTAINER = 'container'
    AND path IN ('/promotions', '/search')
  GROUP BY 1
),

ORDERS_SITE AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    ORD_CREATED_DT                                            AS date,
    SUM(ORD_ITEM.BASE_CURRENT_PRICE * ORD_ITEM.QTY)          AS tgmv_usd,
    COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(CRT_PURCHASE_ID, ORD_ORDER_ID))   AS transactions,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ORD_BUYER.ID)                              AS buyers,
    SUM(ORD_ITEM.QTY)                                         AS si,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ORD_ORDER_ID)                              AS orders
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.BT_ORD_ORDERS`
  WHERE ORD_CREATED_DT BETWEEN '2026-04-20' AND '2026-05-05'
    AND SIT_SITE_ID             IN ('MLA')
    AND ORD_GMV_FLG             = TRUE
    AND ORD_TGMV_FLG            = TRUE
    AND ORD_ORDER_MSHOPS_FLG    = FALSE
    AND ORD_ORDER_PROXIMITY_FLG = FALSE
    AND ORD_STATUS              = 'paid'
    AND ORD_CATEGORY.MARKETPLACE_ID = 'TM'
  GROUP BY 1
),

SESSIONS_SITE AS (
  SELECT
    TRACK_DATE                                              AS date,
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(UID, SESSION_ID)) AS INT64)  AS ts_sessions
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.BT_MKP_SESSIONS`
  WHERE TRACK_DATE BETWEEN '2026-04-20' AND '2026-05-05'
    AND BU          = 'mercadolibre'
    AND SIT_SITE_ID = 'MLA'
    AND IS_BOUNCE   = FALSE
    AND IS_CORE
  GROUP BY 1
),

TOTAL_SITE_DATA AS (
  SELECT
    o.date,
    o.tgmv_usd,
    s.ts_sessions,
    o.transactions,
    o.buyers,
    o.si,
    o.orders
  FROM ORDERS_SITE o
  LEFT JOIN SESSIONS_SITE s ON o.date = s.date
)

SELECT TO_BASE64(CAST(
  CONCAT(
    '{"campaign":{"name":"DOUBLE DATES","start":"2026-04-20","end":"2026-05-05"},',
    '"ms":',
    (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(STRUCT(
      fecha, campaign_name, line_item, clicks, prints, segmentation
    ))) FROM MS_DATA),
    ',"landing":',
    (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(STRUCT(
      DATE AS date, LANDING_NAME AS landing_name,
      SESSIONS AS sessions, nmv, orders, transactions,
      nsi, users_landing, users_container, users_vip, buyers
    ))) FROM LANDING_DATA),
    ',"container":',
    (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(STRUCT(
      DATE AS date, CONTAINER_NAME AS container_name, vertical,
      sessions, nmv, nsi, orders, transactions,
      users_container, users_vip, buyers
    ))) FROM CONTAINER_DATA),
    ',"total_containers":',
    (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(STRUCT(
      DATE AS date, total_sessions, total_nmv, total_orders, total_buyers
    ))) FROM TOTAL_CONTAINERS_DATA),
    ',"total_site":',
    (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(STRUCT(
      date, tgmv_usd, ts_sessions, transactions, buyers, si, orders
    ))) FROM TOTAL_SITE_DATA),
    ',"targets":{"dates":["2026-04-20","2026-04-21","2026-04-22","2026-04-23","2026-04-24","2026-04-25","2026-04-26","2026-04-27","2026-04-28","2026-04-29","2026-04-30","2026-05-01","2026-05-02","2026-05-03","2026-05-04","2026-05-05"],"ms":{"ctr":null},"total_site":{"sessions":[15876390,15815580,15604512,14801057,13923104,11950701,11386782,15958342,14499880,13673477,11864138,12694445,11156734,11160342,14920281,14654344],"nmv":[35170526,35232764,34242182,32111783,29281180,21298557,22943213,36245871,35335427,34544589,27473804,24490016,22253837,24735375,38690669,40977128]},"landing":{"sessions":[125878,111294,102690,175316,73156,55782,65886,126528,102035,89982,140528,66700,52076,64576,118298,103122],"share_sessions":[0.0079,0.007,0.0066,0.0118,0.0053,0.0047,0.0058,0.0079,0.007,0.0066,0.0118,0.0053,0.0047,0.0058,0.0079,0.007],"ctr":[0.2584,0.2422,0.2237,0.2274,0.2056,0.2131,0.2489,0.2584,0.2422,0.2237,0.2274,0.2056,0.2131,0.2489,0.2584,0.2422],"users_landing":[91725,80120,73260,135985,52970,42119,52483,92198,73454,64194,109002,48296,39321,51439,86201,74237],"users_container":[23700,19405,16386,30921,10888,8978,13062,23822,17791,14358,24785,9927,8381,12802,22272,17980]},"container":{"sessions":[208649,201016,134041,134227,104537,76934,92548,208649,201016,134041,134227,104537,76934,92548,208649,201016],"share_sessions":[0.0131,0.0127,0.0086,0.0091,0.0075,0.0064,0.0081,0.0131,0.0139,0.0098,0.0113,0.0082,0.0069,0.0083,0.014,0.0137],"nmv":[34884,29908,20927,18925,17067,11265,14093,34884,29908,20927,18925,17067,11265,14093,34884,29908],"share_nmv":[0.001,0.0008,0.0006,0.0006,0.0006,0.0005,0.0006,0.001,0.0008,0.0006,0.0007,0.0007,0.0005,0.0006,0.0009,0.0007],"nsi":[727,623,436,394,356,235,294,727,623,436,394,356,235,294,727,623],"nasp":[48,48,48,48,48,48,48,48,48,48,48,48,48,48,48,48],"cvr":[0.0067,0.0069,0.0072,0.0067,0.0075,0.007,0.0065,0.0067,0.0069,0.0072,0.0067,0.0075,0.007,0.0065,0.0067,0.0069],"users_vip":[66920,61974,44279,41960,34463,27048,32005,66920,61974,44279,41960,34463,27048,32005,66920,61974],"transactions":[1403,1380,971,893,779,537,606,1403,1380,971,893,779,537,606,1403,1380]}},',
    '"refreshed_at":"',
    FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires'),
    '"}'
  )
AS BYTES)) AS data_b64
